result.shopName: 东东测试商家·订单测试·自动化测试·勿动

queryList.1: hp_master: select s.shop_id,s.shop_img,s.is_overtime,s.is_punctuality,s.shop_logo,s.shop_status,s.make_time,s.delivery_type,s.city add_city ,s.is_pandaSend,s.is_onlinePay,s.startSendMoney,s.sendMoney,a.add_longitude,a.add_latitude,d.discounts,e.praise_average,e.praise_average_manager ,s.country,s.shop_label,e.composite,e.composite_manager,e.shop_evaluation_num,s.is_week_operation, s.delivery_faraway_type,s.is_user_pack,s.is_supermarket, sea.praise_average_new, sea.new_shop_tag, sea.new_channel_label_url, sea.discount_on, sea.discount_rate, sea.shop_packet_price, sea.shop_packet_price_to_rate, sea.shop_packet_price_no_thr, sea.shop_packet_rate, sea.shop_packet_rate_no_thr, sea.shop_first_discount, sea.first_order_discounts, sea.min_new_user_sku_price, sea.product_discount_tag_desc, sea.product_discount, sea.first_voucher_goods_price, sea.first_voucher_sale_price, sea.member_packet_price, sea.member_packet_price_to_rate, sea.member_packet_price_no_thr, s.shop_name, s.auto_open_close, sea.discount_tag_exc, sea.discount_exc, s.is_supermarket, sea.take_self_discount_tag_exc, sea.take_self_discount_exc, sea.member_min_delivery_range, sea.member_max_delivery_range, sea.member_shop_price, sea.product_discount_promote_type, sea.preorder_closed_support, sea.preorder_open_type, s.shop_order_busy_status, s.new_order_prepare_extend_time, s.shop_order_stop_status, s.shop_order_stop_keep_time, s.shop_order_stop_start_time from (collect c ,shop s,user u ,address a,discounts d ,evaluation e ,shop_extra_info i ,hp_shop_site_config ssc,hp_shop_search_middle sea) left join shop_lang_extra sle on s.shop_id=sle.shop_id and sle.is_del = 0 and sle.lang = "EN" where ssc.shop_id = c.shop_id and ssc.site = 'HP' and ssc.visible =1 and c.shop_id=s.shop_id and i.shop_id=s.shop_id and c.user_id=u.user_id and s.address_id=a.add_id and c.user_id=1398716814 and c.is_del=0 and d.shop_id = s.shop_id and c.collect_status=0 and s.shop_id=e.shop_id and s.is_del = 0 and sea.shop_id = s.shop_id group by s.shop_id order by c.update_time desc, c.collect_id desc LIMIT 20
queryList.2: hp_master: select full_sub_id,full_sub_name,shop_id,`full`,sub,create_time,update_time,is_del,merchant_full,merchant_sub,merchant_full_sub_name ,full_sub_platform,full_sub_merchant from full_sub where shop_id in ( 59750820 , 10124 ) and language_code = 'CN' and is_del=0 and status=1 order by `full` asc
queryList.3: hp_master: SELECT user_id,user_name,user_nick,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,role_id,user_Invitation_code,create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_status,user_salt,user_sex,audit_status,register_source,is_work,real_name,user_push_token,bs,tmp_uid,tmp_money,tmp_total_money,tmp_integral,tmp_order_counts,tmp_pmid,receiving_max,country,user_code,user_email,city_name,is_add_insure,country_code,is_add_zego,phone_number,run_type,base_salary,calling_code,is_tip_show,is_auto_receive_order,is_can_take_order,delivery_remark,qiyu_remark,is_special_driver,first_name,last_name,employee_type,hourly_salary,salary_rule_type,billing_cycle,send_count,shift_type,contract_status,id_photo_front,id_photo_back,star,driver_score,driver_score_frozen_expiry_date,reg_area_id,user_ali_open_id,user_wx_id,new_user_status,delivery_new_user_status,allow_promote,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,phone_number_mask,user_email_mask FROM user WHERE user_id=1398716814
queryList.4: hp_master: SELECT a.shop_id, b.discount_sn, b.date_type, b.day_limit, b.time_limit, b.time_slot_type, b.crowd, c.sub_state, c.break_type, d.city FROM hp_delivery_discount_shop a LEFT JOIN hp_delivery_discount b ON a.discount_sn = b.discount_sn LEFT JOIN hp_activity_config c ON b.activity_sn = c.activity_sn LEFT JOIN shop d on a.shop_id=d.shop_id WHERE b.is_del = 0 AND a.is_del = 0 AND b.discount_status = 1 AND b.start_time <= 1748598982579 AND b.end_time > 1748598982579 AND a.shop_id IN ( 10124 ) AND 1748598982579 between a.start_time and a.end_time
queryList.5: hp_master: select shop_id ,send_money from hp_shop_search_middle where shop_id in ( 59750820 , 10124 )
queryList.6: hp_master: SELECT rec_id,start_tudustr,target_tudustr,distance,update_time FROM ads_hp_search_distance_matrix WHERE (target_tudustr = '115.954,29.660' AND start_tudustr IN ('115.943,29.670','120.210,30.214'))
queryList.7: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'MAKE_TIME_DEFAULT' limit 1
queryList.8: hp_master: SELECT * FROM (SELECT s.shop_id,s.`shop_name`,sbc.`business_category_id`,bc.`business_category_name` FROM shop s LEFT JOIN hp_shop_business_category sbc ON sbc.shop_id = s.shop_id AND sbc.status = 1 AND sbc.category_type = 0 LEFT JOIN `hp_business_category` bc ON sbc.business_category_id = bc.business_category_id AND bc.status = 1 WHERE s.shop_id IN ( 59750820 , 10124 ) ORDER BY sbc.`create_time` DESC ) t1 GROUP BY shop_id
queryList.9: hp_master: SELECT user_id,user_name,user_nick,user_password,user_pic,user_telphone,user_wx_openid,role_id,user_Invitation_code,create_time,update_time,is_del,reg_ip,user_status,user_salt,user_sex,audit_status,register_source,is_work,real_name,user_push_token,bs,tmp_uid,tmp_money,tmp_total_money,tmp_integral,tmp_order_counts,tmp_pmid,receiving_max,country,user_code,user_email,city_name,is_add_insure,country_code,is_add_zego,phone_number,run_type,base_salary,calling_code,is_tip_show,is_auto_receive_order,is_can_take_order,delivery_remark,qiyu_remark,is_special_driver,first_name,last_name,employee_type,hourly_salary,salary_rule_type,billing_cycle,send_count,shift_type,contract_status,id_photo_front,id_photo_back,star,driver_score,driver_score_frozen_expiry_date,reg_area_id,user_ali_open_id,user_wx_id,new_user_status,delivery_new_user_status,allow_promote,user_name_mask,user_telphone_mask,phone_number_mask,user_email_mask FROM user WHERE user_id=1398716814
queryList.10: hp_master: select count(1) from member_entity where user_id = 1398716814 and is_del = 0 and status = 1 and member_start_time < 1748598982619 and member_end_time > 1748598982619
queryList.11: hp_master: select rec_id,user_id,device_id,label_group,label_id,create_time,update_time from hp_user_label WHERE user_id = 1398716814 and label_group = 'new' limit 1
queryList.12: hp_master: select distinct u.red_packet_id,u.collect_source from user_cdKey u where u.user_id=1398716814 and u.language_code in ('ALL' , 'CN') and u.is_used=0 and u.lock_status=0 and u.is_del=0 and u.start_time <= 1748598982627 and u.end_time >= 1748598982627 and u.status = 1 and (u.member_entity_id is null or u.member_entity_id = 0) and (u.city = '九江市' or u.city = '')
queryList.13: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'FIRST_ORDER_DELIVERY_CONFIG' limit 1
queryList.14: hp_master: SELECT imd.index_module_detail_id, imd.module_activity_id, im.module_name, imd.content, imd.img_url, imd.sort, imd.title, imd.type, imd.url, imd.postcode, imd.parent_title, imd.sub_title, imd.visible_type, im.is_auto_associate_city, imd.dimension, im.operate_area_id, imd.is_show_bubble , imd.bubble_content , imd.ad_type , imd.absolute_sort, imd.ad_id, imd.icon_color, imd.img_url_new, imd.jump_data, imd.small_img_url FROM index_module_detail imd LEFT JOIN index_module im ON im.index_module_id = imd.index_module_id WHERE im.city_name = '九江市' AND im.status = 1 AND im.operate_area_id = 0 AND im.visible_type in(0,2) AND imd.visible_type in(0,2) AND imd.sts = 1 AND imd.`status`=1 AND im.module_type = 24 AND im.language_code = 'CN' order by imd.sort DESC,imd.create_time desc
queryList.15: hp_master: select mc.member_city_id,mcr.city_name from member_city mc, member_city_relation mcr,address_config a where mc.`member_city_id` = mcr.`member_city_id` AND mcr.city_name = a.`city_name` AND mc.is_del = 0 AND a.is_del = 0 AND mcr.`city_name` in ( '九江市' , '杭州市' ) AND mc.online_status = 1 ORDER BY mc.`create_time` DESC
queryList.16: hp_master: select id ,start_using ,day_limit ,member_city_id ,create_time ,create_user_id ,update_time ,update_user_id ,is_del from hp_membership_plus_cycle_configuration where is_del = 0 and start_using = 1 and member_city_id in ( 1111640 , 1111378 )
queryList.17: hp_master: SELECT sdsc.shop_id, sdsc.discount_rate, sdsc.member_day_discount_rate, sdsc.member_day_subsidy_price, sdsc.subsidy_price, sdsc.subsidy_type, sdsc.activity_sn, sdsc.member_day_activity_sn, sdsc.subsidy_threshold, sdsc.subsidy_status, sdsc.member_day_threshold FROM hp_shop_discount_subsidy_config sdsc WHERE sdsc.is_del = 0 and sdsc.subsidy_status = 0 and sdsc.shop_id in ( 59750820 , 10124 )
queryList.18: hp_master: SELECT hac.activity_sn FROM hp_activity_config hac WHERE hac.sts = 1 and hac.sub_state in (1, 2, 3) and hac.activity_sn in ( '            ' , '9302PJDG1W' )
